news.t: Trending in the markets: ETFs led by women, focused on women
Hypatia Announces Launch of Exchange Traded Fund - Hypatia Women CEO ETF

holdings.infoBox: WCEO is an equity ETF with a total of 164 individual holdings. The top holdings are Solaris Energy Infrastructure stock at 1.60%, Marathon Petroleum at 1.56%, International Seaways at 1.49%, Kinder Morgan at 1.45%, and CDW Corporation at 1.42%.

overview.description: The Hypatia Women CEO ETF (WCEO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation through an actively managed stock portfolio of US companies that are led by a female Chief Executive Officer. WCEO was launched on Jan 9, 2023 and is issued by Hypatia Capital.

data.title: Trending in the markets: ETFs led by women, focused on women
data.text: Exchange-traded funds are baskets of securities that offer you less risk, enable you to track particular indexes or market sectors, and can be purchased on exchanges.

data.title: Hypatia Announces Launch of Exchange Traded Fund - Hypatia Women CEO ETF
